title: NEWLY ELECTED AMC CORPORATORS SWORN IN; MAYOR AND DEPUTY MAYOR ELECTED
content:
64/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl the 7th May 2026 :The swearing-in ceremony of the 19 newly elected Corporators of the Aizawl Municipal Corporation (AMC), elected in the 2026 AMC elections, was held today at the Board of Corporators (BOC) Meeting Hall, AMC Office, Thuampui. The Mayor and Deputy Mayor were also elected during the function.

The function was chaired by Municipal Commissioner Mr. Joseph H. Lalramsanga. After the names of the newly elected Corporators were read out, Aizawl District Magistrate, Er. Lalhriatpuia, administered the oath of allegiance to the Constitution of India to the 19 newly elected AMC Corporators.

Following the swearing-in ceremony, the election of the Mayor and Deputy Mayor was conducted in accordance with Section 4 of The Mizoram Municipalities (Procedures & Conduct of Business) Rules, 2007. As there were no other candidates, Ward VI Corporator Mr. H. Lalremtluanga was declared elected as Mayor and Ward XVI Corporator Mrs. R. Lalawmpuii as Deputy Mayor under Rule 4(5). The newly elected Mayor and Deputy Mayor also took the oath of secrecy.

The newly elected Mayor, Mr. H. Lalremtluanga, appointed four Executive Corporators namely: Ms. Christina Roluahpuii Sailo (Ward VIII), Mr. Vanlalhruaia (Ward XIII), Mr. Vanlalfaka (Ward III) and Mr. K. Lalrodinga (Ward XVIII). The Executive Corporators also took the oath of secrecy.

Today’s AMC Corporators’ swearing-in ceremony was attended by Chief Minister Mr. Lalduhoma, Assembly Speaker Mr. Lalbiakzama, Ministers Mr. K. Sapdanga, Mr. C. Lalsawivunga, Dr. Vanlalthlana, Mr. B. Lalchhanzova, Prof. Lalnilawma and Mr. Lalnghinglova Hmar, besides Member of Parliament (Rajya Sabha) Mr. K. Vanlalvena and MLAs Mr. Lalchhuanthanga and Mr. H.Ginzalal.

Attachment

title: STANDARDIZED ASSESSMENT FOR ELEMENTARY SCHOOLS (SAFES) 2026 REPORT TLANGZARH A NI
content:
64/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl the 7th May. 2026 :Vawiin May 7, 2026 chawhnu dar 2:30 khan Standardized Assessment for Elementary Schools (SAfES) 2026 Report, SCERT buatsaih chu Pu David Lalthantluanga IAS, Secretary, School Education Department -in a pisaah a tlangzarh.

He SAfES Report tlangzarh inkhawm hi Pi Caroline Zoramthangi, Director, SCERT-in kaihruaiin SAfES buatsaih a nih chhan leh a tumte a sawi a. SAfES hi Dr. Vanlalthlana, Minister, School Education Department hmalakna pawimawh tak niin, Mizoram elementary school-a classroom zirtirna leh zirna tihhmasawn nana buatsaih a nih thu a sawi.

Pi Zoramthangi Ralte, Joint Director-in SAfES  report pe a. SAfES 2026 hi Pawl V leh Pawl VIII third term exam atan buatsaih a ni a, Sub-Divisional Education 20-ah assessment hi neih a ni a. Middle school 733-a  Pawl V zirlai 7889 leh Pawl VIII zirlai 7218 ten he exam hi an pe a ni.

SAfES hi zirlaiten an zirlai an pass leh fail hriatna atan emaw, school mal performance tehna tur emaw-a duan a ni lo va.  A tum ber chu zirlaite dinhmun dik tak hriat a, naupangten zir chhuah tura duan sa eng chen nge an thlen tih leh, naupangte performance en chunga hmasawn zel dan tur hriatna atana hmalakna a ni.

Pu David Lalthantluanga IAS, Secretary, School Education Department chuan he exam felfai taka kalpui a nih hnua report kimchang a bu-a SCERT-in a buatsaih hi lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a, “He report atanga lang chiang tak chu Education Minister academic lama a ngaihna kan nei hian zirna tha leh changkang nei turin ke kan pen a, hma nasa takin kan sawn zel a ni tih a entir a. He assessment system hi a that em avangin class tinah neih theih ni se, tuna la hmang ve rih lo private school te pawh hian an hman ve thuai a rinawm.” a ti bawk.

title: UNION MINISTER OF STATE SHRI SURESH GOPI VISITS KOLASIB
content:
62/2026-2027

Kolasib, 7th May, 2026:Today, Shri Suresh Gopi, Union Minister of State for Petroleum & Natural Gas and Tourism, Government of India, visited Kolasib. He held an interactive meeting with the Head of Offices of various government departments within the district at the DC Conference Hall, Kolasib.

During the session, a brief profile and the general overview of Kolasib district were showcased through a PowerPoint presentation. Union Minister Shri Suresh Gopi expressed his pleasure at being able to meet the people and government officials of Kolasib.

Highlighting the significance of conducting a Census for the nation's progress, the Minister stated that because a Census provides an accurate understanding of the people's living conditions and demographic realities, it is exceptionally crucial for formulating government planning and development strategies.

He expressed his satisfaction that Mizoram is gradually achieving better connectivity, particularly with the ongoing development of a good railway network. He also pointed out the importance of exploring ways to establish more hydro-electric projects so the state can become self-sufficient in its power needs.

Emphasizing the importance of education, the Minister spoke about the necessity of having Kendriya Vidyalayas (KVs). Expressing concern that there is currently only one KV in the entire state of Mizoram, he suggested that the matter of increasing the number of KVs should be taken up with the Members of Parliament (MPs). Noting that women's education plays a highly influential role in a nation's development, he stated that it is important to take proactive steps to encourage more women to pursue fields like nursing.

Stating that basic foundational and school education have a profound impact on children's lives, he added that as long as the quality and standard of education are well-maintained, children can reach great heights in their futures.

Noting that Mizoram possesses fertile land capable of producing excellent crops, he emphasized the need to make dedicated efforts to export horticulture and agriculture products not only to other states but also internationally. During this interactive session, the various departments briefed the Minister on their general functioning and officially submitted their respective requirements and grievances to him.

After concluding the program at the DC Conference Hall, Union Minister Shri Suresh Gopi paid a site visit to the Oil Palm Processing Mill in Bukvannei, where he directly interacted with the local oil palm farmers.

Attachment

title: Larsap-in Tribal Reserch Institute leh Ropuiliani Tribal Freedom Fighters Museum-te tlawhin hmalak dan a enfiah
content:
420/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 7th May, 2026:Mizoram Larsap, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd) chuan vawiin khan Ministry of Tribal Affairs hnuaia sak Tribal Reserch Institute (TRI) leh Ropuiliani Tribal Freedom Fighters Museum (RTFFM), Kelsiha hnathawh mekte chu tlawhin hmalak dan a enfiah.

Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh chuan hnam ziarang, nunphung leh tihdante ngaihhluta vawnhim a pawimawh takzet thu sawiin, Tribal Reserch Institute leh Ropuiliani Tribal Freedom Fighters Museum-te chu tangkai taka hman tura siam a tul thu a sawi a. Khualzin, zirlai leh zirbingmite tana tlawh man hla ni tura thil tha duang turin line department-te a chah a. Tribal hnam ziarang leh Mizo chanchinte awmze nei taka pholan a nih theih nan hun bituk siama hawnfel hma ngeia a nih dan tur dik tak a nih thei nana theihtawp chhuah turin a chah bawk a. A ngaimawh leh tul nia a hriatte hrilhin, hun remchang hmasa berah hmalak dante enfiah leh a tum thu a sawi a ni.

He hunah hian Pu David Lalthantluanga, Secretary, Planning & Programme Implementation Department; Dr. Lalrinchhana, Principal Adviser-cum- Additional Secretary, Planning & Programme Implementation Department; Er. Robin Lalrinawma, Chief Engineer (CE), PWD; Pi Lucy Zaithangpuii, Additional Director, Horticulture Department; Pu TC Lalkhuma, Jt. Secretary, Art & Culture Department leh official dangte an tel a. An hmalak dante Larsap hi an hrilh fiah a ni.

Attachment

title: UNION MINISTER OF STATE PU SURESH GOPI-AN KOLASIB A TLAWH
content:
419/2026-2027

Kolasib, 7th May, 2026:Vawiin khan Pu Suresh Gopi, Union Minister of State for Petroleum & Natural Gas and Tourism, Government of India chuan Kolasib a tlawh a. DC Conference Hall, Kolasib-ah district chhunga sawrkar department hrang hranga hotute (Head of Offices) nen inkawmhona an nei.

He hunah hian Kolasib district chanchin leh dinhmun tlangpui chu PowerPoint presentation hmanga tarlan a ni a. Union Minister Pu Suresh Gopi chuan Kolasib mipuite leh sawrkar hotute a hmu thei chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi.

Minister chuan ram hmasawnna tura chhiarpui (Census) neih pawimawh zia sawiin, Chhiarpui chu mipuite dinhmun leh nihna dik tak hriatchianna a nih avangin, ram hmasawnna tura sawrkar ruahmanna (planning) siam nan a pawimawh em em a ni, a ti.

Mizoramin inkalpawhna (connectivity) tha zawk, a bikin rel kawng tha tak a nei chho mek chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Kawlphetha (power) kan mamawh ang kan inphuhruk theih nan hydro-electric project tam zawk neih theih dan ngaihtuah a pawimawh thu a tarlang bawk.

Zirna lam pawimawhna tarlangin Minister chuan, Kendriya Vidyalaya (KV) neih a pawimawh zia a sawi a. Mizoram pumah KV pakhat chauh a awm chu pawi a tih thu sawiin, KV a tam zel theih nan MP te hnena thlen nise a ti. Hmeichhiate zirna chuan ram hmasawnnaah kawngro a sut thui thu sawiin, nursing lamah te pawh tam zawka an kal theih nana hmalak a pawimawh a ni, a ti.

Basic fundamental education leh school education-in naupangte nuna kawngro a sut thui zia sawiin, a quality leh standard a that phawt chuan naupangten an thlen chin tur sang tak an thleng thei a ni, a ti bawk.

Mizoram chu leilung tha tak leh thlai tha tak tak thar chhuah theihna a nih angin, horticulture leh agriculture product te chu state pawn mai bakah ram pawn thlenga thawn chhuah a nih theih nan theihtawp chhuaha hmalak a pawimawh thu a sawi a. He inkawmna hunah hian department hrang hrang ten an department hnathawh dan tlangpui leh an mamawh hrang hrangte chu Minister hnenah hian an thlen nghal a ni.

DC Conference Hall-a hun an hman zawh hian Union Minister Pu Suresh Gopi hian Bukvannei-a Oil Palm Processing Mill chu a hmunah a tlawh a, hetah hian oil palm chingtute nen inkawmkhawmna an nei nghal a ni.

Attachment

title: SERCHHIP BAWRHSAP HOVIN NEIHLOH KHAW SAWN CHUNGCHANG SAWI HO
content:
418/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 7th May, 2026:Neihloh khaw sawn chungchang sawi hona, nimina Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma hova CM Conference Hall-a neih chu bawhzuiin, vawiin khan Serchhip District Deputy Commissioner Pu Paul L. Khuma kaihhruaina hnuaiah Serchhip District-a sawrkar official-te leh Neihloh khawtlang hruaitute chuan, hmalak zui dan tur ruamhmanna ‘Standard Operating Procedure’ chungchang, DC Meeting Hall ah an sawi ho. Neihloh khaw sawnna tura ruahmanna ‘Master Plan’ duangtu, Town & Country Planning, UD & PA pawh online kaltlangin an tel ve bawk a ni.

Bawrhsap Pu Paul L Khuma chuan Neihloh khua chu Mizoram Remote Sensing Application Centre (MIRSAC) leh Geologist-te zir chianna atanga a lan danin, mihring chenna atana him tawk lo, chhiatrupna thlen theihna hmun a nih thu a sawi a. Geotechnical Survey Report-a a lan danin, Neihloh khaw hmar lam 200m bial chu leimin thut thut awm fo theihna hmun a nih thu leh, chhungkaw za zela sawmruk (60) bawr velte awmna chu lei tawlh hlauhthawnawm ‘Very High Zone” ah an awm tih a sawi a. Hetiang a nih avang hian Sawrkar leh Neihloh khawtlang hruaitute chuan, tuna khaw luahlai atanga hla lutuk lo leh hmun him chin, Km 3 bawr vela hlaah insawnchhuahna turin hma an lak mek thu a sawi a. Mipuite nena thawh hona a pawimawh thu sawiin, Neihloh khawtlang hruaitute chu khaw mipuite zawldawh taka dawr thin tur te, dik leh langtlang taka hna thawk turte leh Mizoram tana khaw entawntlak nih tum turtea chahin duhsakna a hlan a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Sub Deputy Commissioner Pu Vanthangpuia’n Neihloh khaw sawnna tur atana hmalak dan tur ruahmanna ‘Standard Operating Procedure (SOP)’ tlangpui a sawi a, hemi hnu hian sawi hona neih niin hmalak zel dan tur - Committee hrang hrangte leh an hna chanpual theuh tur te, In sak dan tur leh infrastructure hrang hrang din dan turte leh chak taka hna thawh a nih theih dan turte sawi ho a ni.

Neihlohah hian tunah dinhmunah chhungkaw 77 awmin, mi 413 an awm mek a, khaw thar kaina tura In sak thar tura ruahman 92-te chu pawm tawh niin, chenna In pakhat sakna atan sawrkarin cheng nuai 15 zel a pe dawn a. Sum leh pai hman belh tur neite’n lian zawk leh tha zawkin an chenna tur in hi an sa thei bawk ang. In sak dan tur hi a hniam lam (minimum standard) bituk sak vek a ni thung. Sum hi Direct Benefit Transfer-in a dawngtu turte Bank Account-ah, Installment li (4)-in pek tura ruahman a ni.

Attachment

title: AIZAWL MUNICIPALITY CORPORATOR THAR 19 TE LAK LUH NIIN, MAYOR LEH DEPUTY MAYOR THLAN NGHAL A NI
content:
417/2026-2027

Aizawl, 7 May 2026:Vawiin khan Board of Corporators (BOC) Meeting Hall, AMC Office, Ṭhuampuia-ah AMC, 2026 inthlanpuia Corporator thlan thar 19 te lakluhna inkhawm  buatsaih a ni a.  Mayor leh Deputy Mayor thlan nghal a ni.

Corporator thar te lakluhna inkhawm hi Municipal Commissioner Pu Joseph H. Lalramsanga’n  kaihruaiin, Corporator thar te hming a chhiarchhuah zawhah, Aizawl District Magistrate, Er. Lalhriatpuia’n Aizawl Municipality Corporator thar 19-te chu India Dânpui laka rinawmna thutiam (oath of allegiance to the Constitution of India) laktirin a la lut.

Corporator te lakluh an nih hnuah hian The Mizoram Municipalities (Procedures & Conduct of Business ) Rules 2007, Sec 4 in a phut angin, Mayor leh Deputy Mayor thlan nghal a ni a. Candidate dang an awm loh avangin Rules Sec 4 (5) tlawhchhanin Mayor atan Ward VI Corporator Pu H. Lalremtluanga leh Ward XVI Corporator Pi R. Lalawmpuii te chu Deputy Mayor atan tlinga puan an ni a. Mayor leh Deputy Mayor te hian thutiam (oath of Secrecy) an la nghal bawk.

Mayor thlan thar Pu H. Lalremtluanga chuan Executive Corporator tur mi 4: Pi Christina Roluahpuii Sailo (Ward VIII), Pu Vanlalhruaia (Ward XIII), Pu Vanlalfaka (Ward III) leh Pu K. Lalrodinga (Ward XVIII) te a ruat a, Executive Corporator te pawh hian Oath of Secrecy an la ve nghal a ni.

Vawiin AMC Corporator te lakluh inkhawm hi Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma, Assembly Speaker Pu Lalbiakzama, Minister: Pu K.Sapdanga, Pu C.Lalsawivunga, Dr.Vanlalthlana, Pu B.Lalchhanzova, Prof.Lalnilawma, Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar te bakah Member of Parliament(RS) Pu K.Vanlalvena leh MLA: Pu Lalchhuanthanga, Pu Ginzalalate ten telpui a ni.

Attachment

title: Governor Inspects Ongoing Works at Tribal Research Institute and Ropuiliani Tribal Freedom Fighters Museum in Kelsih
content:
61/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 7th May, 2026:Mizoram Governor General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd) today inspected the ongoing development works of the Tribal Research Institute (TRI) and the Ropuiliani Tribal Freedom Fighters Museum (RTFFM) at Kelsih, being implemented under the Ministry of Tribal Affairs.

During the visit, Governor General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh stressed the importance of preserving tribal culture, heritage and traditions. He urged officials to elevate these institutions to exemplary standards, making them truly worthy destinations for tourists, students and researchers. He directed line departments to develop a comprehensive action plan to achieve this goal and called for strict adherence to a tight timeline to complete all necessary preparations ahead of the inauguration. He also noted several points for further consideration and indicated his intention to visit the sites again in the near future.

Senior officials who accompanied the Governor and briefed him on the ongoing works included Pu David Lalthantluanga, Secretary, Planning & Programme Implementation Department; Dr. Lalrinchhana, Principal Adviser-cum-Additional Secretary, Planning & Programme Implementation Department; Er. Robin Lalrinawma, Chief Engineer (CE), Public Works Department; Pi Lucy Zaithangpuii, Additional Director, Horticulture Department; Pu TC Lalkhuma, Joint Secretary, Art & Culture Department, among others.

Attachment

title: Mizo Territorial Army lak tharte thlahna hun hman dan tur thlir lawk
content:
416/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 7th May, 2026:Vawiin khan Champhai South MLA leh Territorial Army Establishment & Coordination Committee Chairman ni bawk Lt.Col.(Retd) Clement Lalhmingthanga hovin Secretariat Conference Hall-I, MINECO-ah Mizo Territorial Army(Mizo TA)lak tharte thlahna hun (Flag-off ceremony) buatsaih dan tur leh an chenna tur (accommodation) chungchang thlirhona meeting neih a ni.

He meeting-ah hian department hrang hrang aiawha kal official-te chuan Mizo TA tana hma an lakna hrang hrangte, an harsatna tawhte leh chung harsatnate sutkian dan tur kawng hrang hrangte an sawi ho a. Hemi bakah hian, TA-te chenna hmun lailawk chu tun aia changtlung leh nuam zawka siam danglam dan tur chungchangte pawh an sawi ho bawk a ni.

MLA Lt.Col.(Retd) Clement Lalhmingthanga chuan Mizo Territorial Army chu hmanlaia 'Zawlbuk' kan neih thin, tunlai thiamna nena chawhpawlh (modernized version) a ni, a ti. Territorial Army recruitment pawh dik taka kalpui niin, duhsak bik leh inbumna tel lova neih a nih thu a sawi a. Mizo TA program hi thalaite leh an chhungte, khawtlang leh kan ram hmasawnna atana tangkai tur a nih thu leh, TA-te tana infrastructure dinte hian a dinna hmun leh kan ram economy hmasawnna a thlen tur thu MLA chuan a sawi a. Sorkar official-te chu Mizo TA program tihchangtlun nan theihtawp chhuah lehzual turin a ngen a ni.

Mizo TA-te flag-off ceremony hlawhtling taka neih a nih theih nana hmalak dan turte meeting ah hian sawiho a ni a. Flag-off ceremony hi May ni 11(Thawhtanni) ah Assembly Annexe Building Conference Hall- ah neih tur a ni a; hei hi 166 Infantry Battalion Territorial Army(Home & Hearth), Assam-a thawk tur, Mizoram atanga recruit batch hmasa ber, mi 144 (mipa 135 leh hmeichhia 9) thlahna hun tur a ni.

Attachment

title: Health Minister Pi Lalrinpuii'n Lungleiah Bethesda Higher Secondary School Graduation Day 2026 a hmanpui
content:
415/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭomir thla ni 7:Lungleia Bethesda Higher Secondary School chuan vawiin khan Lunglei Chanmari-a UPC Conference Hall-ah kum 2026 Higher Secondary School Leaving Certificate (HSSLC) Examination result chhuaka an zirlai Class–Xll pass mi 74 te pualin Graduation Day 2026 an buatsaih a. Mizoram sawrkara Health & Family Welfare Minister Pi Lalrinpuii'n Khuallian niin a hmanpui.

Health & Family Welfare Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan Bethesda Higher Secondary School aṭanga HSSLC pass tharte leh zirtirtu leh Board Member-te lawmpuina leh duhsakna a hlan a. Mizoram sawrkarin Mizorama lar chho mek zirna hmanga sumdawnna (Commercialisation of Education) tihnep tuma hma a laknaah kuminah MBSE result bu-ah top 10 tar lan a ni ta lo tih sawiin, school hrang hrang chu pass percentage neih ṭhat leh top 10-a tling neih tamah ringawt inel lovin, chhawr tlak zir chhuak (alumni) neih ṭhatah te inel ṭhin zawk se a duh thu a sawi a. Zirlaite chu anmahni leh an chhungkaw tan rin tlak, rin ngam ni a, eng hna pawh thawk se hlawhtlinna tluantling nei thei tura taima taka an zirlaite bei zel turin a fuih a. Khawvel chu a chak chak emaw, a fing fing emaw din chhuahna ni ngawt lovin, danglamna mila inher rem thiam apiang vanneihna a nihna hmu thiam turin zirlaite leh zirtirtute fuihin, zirlai hlawhtling tharte chu tun lai mila inher rem chho zel a, hnain thiamna a phut leh ei zawnna atana hman theih tur zirna course thlang thiam turin a chah.

Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan Mizoram sawrkarin mipuite tan kawng hrang hrangin hma lakna a kalpui tih sawiin, sawrkar hmasa lam aṭanga kalpui, mi rethei "BPL" tan buhfai KG khat cheng 3-a pek chu tun sawrkar pawhin a la chhunzawm char char avangin Mizoramah thingtlang kilkhawr ber thlengin tu mah ei tur nei lo, chhuanchham, meialh en kan awm lo tlangpui tih a sawi a. Thihna a awm a, mi dang sum puk emaw, MLA-te tihbuai emaw a ngaihna ṭhin ber "Ruang phurh" chu sawrkarin kutken a, thingtlang mi rethei zawkte in luma ruang thlen a ni ta chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, Mipui Healthcare (MUHCS) avanga mi rethei leh harsa zawkte'n sum sen ngai lova damdawi ina an inenkawl tak avanga an lawm leh hlim hmelin chakna thar a pek ṭhin thu a sawi a. Hetih rual hian Mizoram chu ruihhlo leh HIV/AIDS-in a run mek avangin fimkhur leh ṭan lak a ṭul thu sawiin, ṭhalaite chu ruihhlo laka inthiar fihlim tur te, tihdamna awm lo, awlsam taka inven theih si natna HIV/AIDS lakah inveng tur te, insum, kawppuite laka rinawm, insum thei lo tan invenna (condom) hman leh kawppui turte dinhmun inhriat chian nana nupui pasal innei turte'n HIV test hmasak te ngai pawimawh turin a chah.

Bethesda HSS Graduation Day 2026-ah hian he sikul aṭanga zir chhuak (alumna) Dr Gospel Lallawmzuali chu Khual Zahawm niin, zirlaite fuihna thu a sawi a. Rev. Dr F. Sangvela'n hunserh hmangin, Principal Pu Lalnunsanga Pachuau chuan inlawmna thu a sawi a. Managing Board Member Pu Lalrotluanga bakah, zirlai nu leh pate aṭangin thu sawi ngaihthlak niin, zirlai chhuak tur T. Lalrindiki (XII Arts) leh K. Lalrinfela (XII Science) te'n inthlahna thu (valedictorian speech) an sawi a. Rosalind (Class–X) leh Edelyn (XII Commerce) te'n kal khawmte zaia awiin, Bethesda Cultural Club-in lam an entir bakah, Bethesda Choir te'n hla an rem bawk a. Miss Vanlalsiami'n lawm thu sawiin hun a khar.

Bethesda HSS hian kumin HSSLC exam result chhuakah Class–Xll Arts zirlai mi 48 aṭangin zirlai 47 hlawhtlinna chang an nei a. Class–Xll Science zirlai mi 30 te pass vekin, Lunglei District-a Science Stream pass vek nei school awm chhun an ni a. Nikum aṭanga hawn ṭan Commerce Stream-ah pawh an vawi khat exam-naah 100% pass result neiin, zirlai mi 8 te an pass vek bawk.

Bethesda HSS aṭang hian kum tin coaching hranpa kal lova class-a zirtirna aṭanga Joint Entrance Examination (JEE) inziak tling an nei ziah ṭhin a. Kuminah pawh an nei leh a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT LEVEL GOVERNMENT LAND POOLING THUKHAWM
content:
413/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 7th May 2026 :Vawiin khan Pu Donny Lalruatsanga, Lawngtlai Bawrhsap leh Chairman, District Level Government Land Authority nibawk kaihruaiin DC Conference Hall- ah thutkhawm an nei.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan thutkhawm chhan siawfiahin, sawrkar ram zawng zawng GAD - in an neih leh enkawl tawh thu a tarlang a. Sawrkar ram neih zau dan in anglo tak tak awmin, heng ramte hi a mamawhtu department- ten an hman tangkai dan kawng dap a ni, a ti a. Department - ten ram hman tangkai loh an neihte a awm a nih chuan a mamawhtu hnena hlan chhawn a nihin, sawrkar tan hmalak a awlsam dawn tiin, mahni department theuhah lo enfiah turin a chah a ni.

Thutkhawmah hian Head of Department - ten ram an neih dan tlangpui sawizauna an nei a. Tun dinhmunah ram awl a vang hle tih tarlan a ni a, chutih rualin ram mamawh Department - an awm a nih chuan theih ang ang hmalak pui ni se an ti a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Lawngtlai District - a Head of Department - te leh Sr. Revenue Officer, LADC- te an tel thei a, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar.

Attachment

title: PM Vishwakarma Scheme chungchang meeting neih a ni
content:
412/2026-2027

Aizawl the 7th May, 2026:Vawiin khan 4th State Monitoring Committee on PM Vishwakarma Scheme chu Secretariat Conference Hall-I, MINECO ah, Commerce, Industries, Geology & Mining Department Secretary Dr. H.Lianzela hovin neih a ni a. He meeting ah hian line department hrang hranga official te, SLBC Coordinator, District hrang hranga Deputy Commisioner, DCIO leh Lead District Manager te an tel a ni.

Dr H Lianzela chuan Loan chungchang nasa lehzuala artisans (kut themthiamna neite) hnena zirtir a ngaih thu sawiin Training Centre-te District Headquarters ah mai ni lo, khaw dangah te pawh a theih chin chinah hawn belh dan ngaihtuah ni se, a ti a. He scheme hi a hlawhtlin theih nan line department zawng zawng te nena tanruala thawhhona tha neih a pawimawh hle a ni, a ti.

Pi H.Lalchhandami, Joint Secretary, Commerce, Industries, Geology & Mining Department, Govt. of Mizoram Nodal officer ni bawk chuan scheme chungchanga hmalakna te a tarlang a. Tun dinhmunah hian mi 11082 inziaklut tawhin heng zinga 3397 hian Stage-3 an paltlang tawh a ni. Basic skills training zo tawh hi mi 1373 niin, toolkit dawng tawh mi 139 an awm tawh a, loan sanction tawh zat hi 102 niin, mi 51 hnenah pek an ni tawh bawk a ni.

Meeting-ah hian Scheme-a harsatna tawh hrang hrangte leh hmalak dan tur sawi ho niin harsatna te sut kian dan tur ngaihtuah ho ani PM Vishwakarma scheme kal zel dan tur sawiho a nih bakah tun aia nasa zawka kut themthiamna nei ten an chhawr theih dan tur te sawi ho tel a ni bawk. PM Vishwakarma Scheme hnuaia hlawhtlingte chanchin (Success Story) Serchhip District atangin ngaihthlak a ni bawk.

PM Vishwakarma scheme hi India ram pumpuiah September Ni 17, 2023 ah Prime Minister Narendra Modi chuan a hawng a. He scheme hi kut themthiamna nei bik Trade 18 te- Puan thui, lu met, bel vawtu, thirdeng/thirchher, basket maker, naute lem siam, thing leh lung mistiri leh a dangte dawmkanna atana siam a ni.

He scheme  hian  basic leh advance Training te, loan pung tlem zawk leh an trade a zira bungrua Rs 15,000/- man hu dawn theihna a keng tel a. He scheme atana Nodal Department chu Commerce, Industries, Geology & Mining Department a ni.

Attachment

title: Adviser to CM Pu TBC Lalvenchhunga'n Guwahati-ah WRI huaihawt 'CSR Workshop on Clean Energy' a hmanpui
content:
411/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 7th May 2026:Vawiin khan Novotel Conference Hall, Guwahati-ah World Resources Institute (WRI) huaihawtin 'CSR Workshop on Clean Energy for Development in Northeast India' neih a ni a. Adviser to CM leh Mizoram CSR Cell Chairman ni Pu TBC Lalvenchhunga chu khualzahawm a ni.

Pu TBC Lalvenchhunga chuan, WRI in hmar-chhak bial pum huapa hetiang hun tha an buatsaih hi a lawmawm a. India ram pumpuia Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) sum hman atanga chhutin Northeast region hian kan dawng tlem hle a. Hmarchhak state-te zingah pawh Mizoram chu CSR fund kan dawng tlem ber a ni. Hei hi siamthat a ngai a, tan kan lak tlan a tul. CSR hi vawi khat thilpek (one-time donation) ang maia ngaih a ni fo va, ram hmasawnna tura hun rei tak awh tur project leh programme rintlak kalpui theih a nihna hi kan hriat a tha, a ti.

Renewable Energy (RE) chungchanga Mizoram sorkar hmalaknate tarlangin, Sorkar laipui scheme 'PM Surya Ghar: Muft Bijli Yojana' (Roof-top Solar) chu chak zawka kalpui a nih theih nan Mizoram sorkar chuan central subsidy awmsa bakah state subsidy a pek belh a. Hma kan sawnpui hle. Solar Policy thar pawh duan a ni, a ti.

Hmasawnna tluantling nei tura Renewable Energy policy mumal tak neih a tul thu leh project hrang hrangte vawn that (maintenance) leh endik (monitoring) kawnga tan lak a ngaih thu a sawi bawk.

He hunah hian hmarchhak state hrang hrang atangin sorkar lama CSR buaipuitu hotute, CSR fund dawng thin Civil Society Organisations (CSO) hrang hrang aiawhte, bakah CSR fund petu Company Foundation hrang hrang aiawhte an tel a ni.

World Resources Institute (WRI) hi America (USA) behchhan non-profit research organisation lian tak, khawvel hmun hrang hranga inzar pharh an ni a. Workshop-ah hian Northeast leh hmun danga zirchianna an lo neih tawhte an tarlang a. Renewable energy lama CSR sum hman tangkai theih dan te, harsatna awm thinte leh hmasawn dan turte zirho a ni.

Pu TBC Lalvenchhunga hi Chief Minister's Office-a CSR Cell hotuten an tawiawm a ni.

Attachment

title: CHAMPHAIAH RALTLAN CHHAWMDAWLNA CHUNGCHANG NGAIHTUAHA THUTKHAWM NEIH A NI
content:
410/2026-2027

Champhai, dated 7th May, 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar 11 khan Champhai District chhunga raltlante hnena tanpuina pek dan tur (humanitarian assistance) chungchanga sawihoin District Administration leh tlawmngai pawlte DC Conference Hall, Keifangtlangah an thukhawm.

He hun hi District Bawrhsap Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan kaihruaiin Mizorama Myanmar atanga rawn raltlante leh a thlengtu khawtlang mipui harsa zawkte tana himna leh eizawnna siamsak tura hmalakna PATHRISE Project 2026 chungchang thlirho a ni a, PATHRISE Project 2026 hi raltlante leh anmahni thlengtu khawtlang mipuite mamawh hrang hrang phuhruk nana ruahmanna lian leh pawimawh tak a ni.

PATHRISE Project 2026 hnuaia thawktute hnen atangin raltlan ten an rawn belh khawtlang mipuite chhawmdawlna tura hma an lo lak tawhna leh hmalakna tur hmachhawp an la neih te ngaihthlak a ni a, Myanmar atanga rawn raltlante hriattur pawimawh tak tak dan leh dun zirtir te, Umbrella Protection an tih hnuaia activities an lo neih tawh hrang hrang - naupangte venhimna chungchang te zirtirna leh pawimawh hrang hrangah hmalak an tum dan te chipchiar taka ngaihthlak a ni.

PATHRISE Project 2026 hian Indo leh buaina avanga thil pawi tak tak tawng, rilru lam hliam tuarte hnena rilru damna tura puih leh thurawn pek te, Naupang leh hmeichhiate himna tura hmun him siam leh hleilenna laka venhim hna thawh te, Raltlante tana lehkha pawimawh neih dan tur kawhhmuh a, an dikna chanvo hrilhhriat leh sorkar leh NGO atanga tanpuina an dawn theih nan a puih te chu an hnathawh pawimawh tak zing ami a ni a, midang puihna ringawt lova mahni ke a an din theih nan leh eizawnna ngelnghet an neih theih nan ruahmanna pawh siam a ni a, Mizoram chhunga eizawnna theih tur ang chi leh thiamthil tangkai zirtir te, eizawnna bul an tan theih nan sum fai a tanpui leh lo neih emaw ran vulh nana thlai chi leh rante a thlawna semin hma an la thin a ni. Raltlante leh Khawtlang mite'n inpumkhatna tha tak an neih theihna turin hma kawng hrang hrangin an la a, Raltlante an lo luh thut avanga tualchhung mite eizawnna leh neihsum lama harsatna lo thleng theite chhawk zangkhai a, Raltlan leh tualchhung mite inkarah inremna leh inlungrualna a awm theih nana hmalak chu an hnathawh lian ber pakhat a ni.

He hunah hian Health Department aiawha kalte pawhin raltlante tana damdawi lama chhawmdawlna an lo kalpui tawh dan te, dam lo an lo enkawl tawh dan report an pe a, Zoram Entu Pawl leh tlawmngai pawlte atangin hma an lak tawh dan report ngaihthlak a ni bawk. Raltlante mi note thlalak chu hmun tam zawkah tih zawh vek tawh a nih laiin hmun tlemtea raltlan tharte mit note thlalak hi la tih a nih loh avanga a rang thei ang bera hmalak nghal dan tur pawh meeting-ah hian an sawiho nghal.

Attachment

title: Power Minister Pu F Rodingliana’n Lammuala Gas Insulated Power Sub-Station dahna tur a enfiah
content:
409/2026-2027

Aizawl the 7th May, 2026:Tukin zing dar 8 khan Power and Electricity Minister Pu F. Rodingliana leh Lammual Advisory Committee hotuten Lammual-a 33KV Gas insulated Power Sub-Station dahna tur hmun leh Lammual chhunga hmun pawimawh hrang hrang sak turte power mamawh dan tur leh hrui kal tir dan tur an enfiah.

Lammualah hian 33KV Gas Insulated Power Sub-Station cheng Vaibelchhe 22.36 senga dah tur hi Mizoram sorkar-in sum a pe chhuak tawh a; Lammual chhunga dah tur hmun pawimawh tak tak, heng - Vanapa Hall, Amphitheater, PHED Reservoir (Litre nuai 12 dawng) bakah Aizawl Square-te power mamawh pekchhawnna tur cheng Vaibelchhe 9.2 senga siam tura ruahman a ni bawk.

He 33kV Sub-Station hian Aizawl khawpui chawmtu 33kV Indoor Sub-Station, 33kV Maumual Sub-Station, 33kV Chawnpui Sub-Station leh 33kV Tlangnuam Sub-Station te nasa takin a chhawk zangkhai dawn a, he Sub-Station hi din fel a nih hunah chuan tam tak lo awm tur atana Aizawl khawpui chhunga power sem chhuahna kawnga mamawhte a phuhruk thei dawn a ni.

He Sub-station hmanga Lammual chhunga power hrang hrang pek chhuahna hi lei hnuaia phum tura ruahman a ni a. Gas Insulated Sub-Station hi Sub-Station pangngai ang ni lovin hmun a mamawh tlem a, a hmun awh tur hi 34X26 meter bial vel chauh a ni ang. P&E Minister hian Lammual chhunga power pekna tur line ruahman te en kualin a tlawh kual a ni.

Minister hi P&E Commissioner Pi K Lalrinzuali, Pu Jacob Lalawmpuia, UD&PA Director, E-in-C  Er Ngursailova Sailo leh Lammual Advisory Committee member-te bakah P&E Department Officer-ten an tawiawm a ni.

Attachment

title: CHAMPHAIAH RAM DANG ATANGA DAN LOVA CIGARETTE LAKLUH TIHCHHIAT A NI
content:
408/2026-2027

Champhai, dated 7th May, 2026:Champhaiah nikum July 2025 leh January, 2026 chhunga ram dang atanga dan lova cigarette lakluh Controller of Legal Metrology thupek leh District Magistrate hriatpuinain Legal Metrology Office tual, Champhai Vengsang-ah tihchhiat a ni.

Pu Lalbiakfela Addl DC chuan dan lova bungrua, a bik takin foreign cigarette lakluh kan do hian, sumdawnna dik lo kan do mai a ni lova, kan thalaite hriselna leh an hma hun kan humhalhna hmanraw pawimawh tak a ni a ti a. Heng foreign cigarette-te hi chhiah chawi lova lakluh an nih avangin kan economy tan chhiatna a nih rualin sum leh pai ai maha pawi zawk chu kan hriselna a ni. Heng meizial, flavor hrang hrang neia siamte hi thalaite tan a itawm hle a, a thlum tui vang emaw A rim a tui kan tih kar hian, kan chuap leh kan taksa tana hlauhawm tak tak kan hip lut reng a ni tih kan hriat a, a dona kawnga theihtawp chhuah a tul takzet a ni tiin cigarette man khawm te hi a ti chhia a ni.

He hun puala inkhawm tawi kaihruaitu Pu V. Lalfakzuala, Assistant Controller, Legal Metrology, Champhai chuan Legal Metrology (Packaged Commodities) Rules 2011 rule 6 leh The Legal Metrology Act, 2009 section 18 in thuneihna a pek angin dan bawhchhiaa lakluh foreign cigarette-te man thin an ni, a ti a. Dan lova lakluh cigarette te'n chhiah an chawi lova, declaration mumal an nei lova, dan hnuaia zawrh chhuah thin cigarette hralhna chena a nghawng avangin man thin an ni, a ti bawk.

Pu Felix Lalruatsanga, Inspector, Legal Metrology, Champhaiin report a pe a, cigarette man te hi packet nuai thum sangkua zasarih sawmpahnih (3,09,712) brand hrang hrang , tualchhung rate-a chhuta cheng nuai 200 man hu a ni a, heng contraband cigarettes te hian Legal Metrology Act, 2009 an zawm loh avangin Rule 19 hnuaia sub rule (4) & (6) Legal Metrology (Enforcement) Rule, 2010 hmangin Controller of Legal Metrology in Disposal order a chhuah hmanga tihchhiat a nih thu a sawi.

He hunah hian Legal Metrology Department thawktute, Champhai District Anti-Tobacco Squad, Police Department,  Assam Rifle officials leh I&PR Officials an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: UNION MINISTER OF STATE FOR CONSUMER AFFAIRS, FOOD AND PUBLIC DISTRIBUTION PI NIMUBEN JAYANTIBHAI BAMBHANIYA-IN KHAWZAWL A LO TLAWH TUR CHUNGCHANGAH MEETING NEI
content:
407/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 7th May, 2026 :Vawiin khan Khawzawl DC Pu K. Vanlalthiana kaihhruaiin DC Conference Hall-ah May 14-16 inkara Union Minister of State for Consumer Affairs, Food And Public Distribution Pi Nimuben Jayantibhai Bambhaniya-in Khawzawl a lo tlawh tur chungchangah Khawzawl district chhunga Head of Office-te inpuahchahna leh sawihona meeting neih a ni.

He thutkhawmah hian DC Pu K. Vanlalthiana chuan Head of Office kalkhawmte chu an department theuha an hmalaknate hrechiang tura chahin, Union Minister of State nen meeting neih a nih hunah pawh tel ngei turin a chah a. Union Minister of State dawnsawn dan tur leh Khawzawl district chhunga sawrkar hmun pawimawh leh scheme hrang hrang hnuaia hmalaknate tlawh pui dan tur rel a ni.

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP HOVIN DRUG REDUCTION SQUAD - TEN THUTKHAWM NEI
content:
406/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 7th May 2026:Vawiin khan Lawngtlai Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga kaihhruaiin Drug Reduction Squad - ten DC Office Chamber-ah thutkhawm nei.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan kalkhawmte hnenah lawmthu a sawi a. Ruihhlo Do beihpui thlak mekah 'Operation Jericho' leh Drug Free District Campaign-kalpui mek a nih thu a tarlang a. Ruihhlo do kawngah sawrkar leh NGO - te theihtawp chhuah dun a tul hle tih sawiin, a bik takin CYLA hnuaia 'Drug Reduction Squad (DRS)' hmalakna leh hnathawh fakawm a tih thu a tarlang a ni. Lawngtlai District-ah muanna awm tur te, khawpui fai leh chhenfakawm zawk siam turin ruihhlo um bo a tul hle a, a do na kawngah tha thlah theih a ni lo, a ti. Sawrkar leh VC, NGO, Kohhran leh mipuite tandun ngai leh intihchak tawn tul tak a nih angin ruihhlo do kawngah thawhhona tha zawk a awm zel a beisei thu a sawi a ni.

Thutkhawmah hian thil pawimawh tak tak sawiho a ni a. Ruihhlo ngai leh a zuartute tan 'Salvation Camping' emaw 'Crusade' buaitsaih ni se, a hmun atan LIKBK Central Chruch, Bazar Veng ni se tih niin, ziakin Kohhran lamah hian dilna thlen ni se an ti a. Hemi atan hian Organising Commitee - din ni se tih niin, Chairman- Deputy Commissioner; Working Chairman - Secretary, LIKBK Central Chruch; Secretary - AGS, CYLA; Asst. Secretary - President, MJA ; Treasurer - Treasurer, CYLA; Ex Officio Members- President, leh GS, CYLA; Chairman,LIKBK Central Chruch; President, DVCA; Chairman, DRS ; President LWA, MHIP; President / Chairman leh Secretary LIKBKTP, Central Chruch, te ruat an ni. Salvation Camping - hi October leh November thla chhunga neih ni se, Speaker atan Pu Frederick Lalrindika sawm ni se tih a ni a. Ruihhlo do kawngah sawrkar leh VC, NGO leh Kohhran inkarah thawhhona tha zawk awm zel se an ti a bawk a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian CYLA Office Bearers, DRS hruaitute,  MHIP leh LWA aiawh, President, MJA Lawngtlai, President Village Council Association, leh Secretary, LIKBK Central Chruch - te an tel thei a, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar.

Attachment

title: KHAWZAWLA TEJAS WORKSHOP NEIH TUR CHUNGCHANG SAWIHONA MEETING NEI
content:
405/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 7th May, 2026 :Nimin khan Khawzawl Deputy Commissioner huaihawtin NIC Room, DC Office-ah Khawzawl District-a TEJAS Workshop neih dan tur chungchang sawihona meeting neih a ni. He meeting hi Addl. DC Pu K. Zorammuana chuan a kaihruai.

He thutkhawmah hian Start Up India hmalakna hnuaia TEJAS Workshop neih dan tur sawiho a ni a, Mizoram Start Up Mission, Planning & Programme Implementation Department lam atangin hmalakna tur leh hmachhawp hrang hrangte ngaihthlak a ni.

TEJAS Workshop hi Mizorama District 5 thlan bikahte neih tura ruahman a ni a, District chhunga mahni kut kawih eizawnna kalpuitute leh hetiang lama hma lo la tawh thinte leh ruahmanna nei mekte tan sawrkarin he Workshop hi a buatsaih dawn a ni.

He meeting-ah hian TEJAS Workshop atana line department official hrang hrang BDO, DAO, DVO, DFDO leh DHO-te an tel a ni.

Attachment
